docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAZQUEZ, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, IVAN AN INDIVIDUAL
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAZQUEZ, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, IVAN AN INDIVIDUAL $2,019.03 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,112.03
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, IVAN AN INDIVIDUAL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MARGAIN, TOMAS E. SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR VAZQUEZ, FRANCISCO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, IVAN AN INDIVIDUAL
